title: IntervalColumnStatistics
description: Statistics computed over a specific time window for a streaming dataset column.

windowStart.description: Start timestamp of the time interval over which the statistics are computed

windowEnd.description: End timestamp of the time interval over which the statistics are computed

mean.description: Average value of the column within the time interval

min.description: Minimum value of the column within the time interval

max.description: Maximum value of the column within the time interval

variance.description: Variance of the column values within the time interval

std.description: Standard deviation of the column values within the time interval

median.description: Median value of the column within the time interval

range.description: Difference between the maximum and minimum values within the time interval

perc05.description: 5th percentile value of the column within the time interval

perc95.description: 95th percentile value of the column within the time interval

pctMissingVals.description: Percentage of missing values in the column within the time interval

count.description: Number of values considered for computing the statistics within the time interval

generatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when these statistics were generated

scopeType.description: Whether the statistics refer to the whole stream/dataset (global) or to a specific entity such as a station (station)

scopeId.description: Identifier of the entity to which the statistics refer when scopeType is not global (e.g. station identifier)
